snippet.title: MasterChef 5 ‚Äď ő†őĪŌćőĽőŅŌā: ¬ęőó őúőĪŌĀőĮőĹőĪ őīőĶőĹ őĶőĮőĹőĪőĻ ŌĄŌĆŌÉőŅ őļőĪőļőĻő¨ ŌĆŌÉőŅ ŌÜőĪőĮőĹőĶŌĄőĪőĻ - őü őôŌČő¨őĹőĹő∑Ōā ŌÖŌÄőŅőīŌÖŌĆŌĄőĪőĹ ő≠őĹőĪőĹ ŌĀŌĆőĽőŅ¬Ľ
snippet.description:
ő£ŌĄőŅ ŌÉŌĄőŅŌćőĹŌĄőĻőŅ ŌĄő∑Ōā őĶőļŌÄőŅőľŌÄőģŌā ¬ęő£ŌĄő∑ ő¶ŌČőĽőĻő¨ ŌĄŌČőĹ őöőŅŌÖ őöőŅŌÖ¬Ľ ő≤ŌĀő≠őłő∑őļőĶ őŅ ő†őĪŌćőĽőŅŌā őßő¨ŌÄŌÄőĻőĽőŅŌā, őŅ ŌÄőĪőĮőļŌĄő∑Ōā ŌÄőŅŌÖ őĪŌÄőŅŌáŌéŌĀő∑ŌÉőĶ ŌĄőŅ ő≤ŌĀő¨őīŌÖ ŌĄő∑Ōā őĒőĶŌÖŌĄő≠ŌĀőĪŌā őĪŌÄŌĆ ŌĄőŅ MasterChef 5. őü ő†őĪŌćőĽőŅŌā őľőĮőĽő∑ŌÉőĶ ő≥őĻőĪ ŌĄő∑őĹ ŌÄőŅŌĀőĶőĮőĪ ŌĄőŅŌÖ ŌÉŌĄőŅőĹ őīőĻőĪő≥ŌČőĹőĻŌÉőľŌĆ őľőĪő≥őĶőĻŌĀőĻőļőģŌā őļőĪőĻ ő≥őĻőĪ ŌĄőŅŌÖŌā ŌÉŌÖőľŌÄőĪőĮőļŌĄőĶŌā ŌĄőŅŌÖ.
¬ęőēőĮőīőĪ őīőĻőĪŌÜőŅŌĀő¨ ŌÉŌĄő∑ őúőĪŌĀőĮőĹőĪ őľőĶŌĄő¨ ŌĄő∑őĹ őĶŌÄőĻŌÉŌĄŌĀőŅŌÜőģ ŌĄő∑Ōā. őöőĪŌĄőĪőĽőĪő≤őĪőĮőĹŌČ ŌĆŌĄőĻ őĶőĮőĹőĪőĻ ő≠őĹőĪ őĪőľŌÜőĻőĽőĶő≥ŌĆőľőĶőĹőŅ ő¨ŌĄőŅőľőŅ. ő£ŌĄő∑ őĪŌĀŌáőģ őĶőĮŌáőĶ őľőĮőĪ ŌÉŌĄŌĀőĪŌĄő∑ő≥őĻőļőģ, őĪőĽőĽő¨ őľőĶŌĄő¨ őģőīő∑ ŌĆŌĄőĻ ŌĆőĽőŅ őĪŌÖŌĄŌĆ ŌĄő∑Ōā ő≥ŌćŌĀőĻő∂őĶ boomerang őļőĪőĻ őļőĽőĶőĮŌÉŌĄő∑őļőĶ ŌÉŌĄőŅ őīŌČőľő¨ŌĄőĻŌĆ ŌĄő∑Ōā. őďőĶőĹőĻőļő¨ ŌĄő∑őĹ ŌÄő¨ŌČ ŌĄő∑ őúőĪŌĀőĮőĹőĪ. őĒőĶőĹ őĶőĮőĹőĪőĻ ŌĄŌĆŌÉőŅ őļőĪőļőĻő¨ ŌĆŌÉőŅ ŌÜőĪőĮőĹőĶŌĄőĪőĻ. őúőŅŌÖ őĪŌĀő≠ŌÉőŅŌÖőĹ őŅőĻ őīŌÖőĹőĪőľőĻőļő≠Ōā ő≥ŌÖőĹőĪőĮőļőĶŌā őļőĪőĻ őģŌĀőłőĪőľőĶ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć őļőŅőĹŌĄő¨ őĪŌÄŌĆ ŌĄő∑őĹ őĪŌĀŌáőģ.¬Ľ

ő£ŌĄő∑ ŌÉŌÖőĹő≠ŌáőĶőĻőĪ, őĪőĹőĪŌÜő≠ŌĀőłő∑őļőĶ ŌÉŌĄőŅőĹ őôŌČő¨őĹőĹő∑ őľőĻőĪŌā őļőĪőĻ őĶőĮŌáőĶ őľőĻőĽőģŌÉőĶőĻ ő≥őĻőĪ ŌĄő∑őĹ őĪőĹŌĄőĻŌÄő¨őłőĶőĻőĪ ŌÄőŅŌÖ ő≠ŌáőĶőĻ ŌÉŌĄő∑ őúőĪŌĀőĮőĹőĪ. őü őĮőīőĻőŅŌā ŌÄŌĀőŅŌā ő≠őļŌÄőĽő∑őĺő∑ ŌĆőĽŌČőĹ őīőģőĽŌČŌÉőĶ ŌÄŌČŌā őŅ őôŌČő¨őĹőĹő∑Ōā ¬ęő•ŌÄőŅőīŌÖŌĆŌĄőĪőĹ ő≠őĹőĪőĹ ŌĀŌĆőĽőŅ őľő≠ŌÉőĪ ŌÉŌĄőŅ ŌÉŌÄőĮŌĄőĻ. őĒőĶőĹ őģŌĄőĪőĹ ŌĄŌĆŌÉőŅ őĶŌÄőĻőłőĶŌĄőĻőļŌĆŌā ŌĆŌÉőŅ ő≠őīőĶőĻŌáőĹőĶ ŌÉŌĄő∑őĹ őļő¨őľőĶŌĀőĪ. őČŌĄőĪőĹ ő≥őĽŌÖőļŌĆŌā, őģŌÉŌÖŌáőŅŌā őļőĪőĻ őľőĶ ŌáőĻőŅŌćőľőŅŌĀ. ő†őĻőŅ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć ŌÉőŅőļő¨ŌĀőŅőľőĪőĻ őľőĶ ŌĄőŅőĹ őôŌČő¨őĹőĹő∑ őļőĪőĻ ŌĆŌáőĻ őľőĶ ŌĄő∑ őúőĪŌĀőĮőĹőĪ.¬Ľ

ő§ő≠őĽőŅŌā, őľőĮőĽő∑ŌÉőĶ ő≥őĻőĪ ŌĄő∑ ŌÉŌÖőĹőĶŌĀő≥őĪŌÉőĮőĪ ŌĄőŅŌÖ őľőĶ ŌĄőŅőĹ őĒőĻőŅőĹŌćŌÉő∑ ŌÉŌĄő∑őĹ ŌĄőĶőĽőĶŌÖŌĄőĪőĮőĪ őŅőľőĪőīőĻőļőģ őīőŅőļőĻőľőĪŌÉőĮőĪ: ¬ęőēőĮőľőĪőĻ ő¨őĹőłŌĀŌČŌÄőŅŌā ŌÄőŅŌÖ ő≠ŌáŌČ ŌÖŌÄőŅőľőŅőĹőģ. őü őĒőĻőŅőĹŌćŌÉő∑Ōā őľőĪő≥őĶőĮŌĀőĶŌÖőĶ őļőĪőĻ őļőĪőłő¨ŌĀőĻő∂őĶ. őäŌÉŌČŌā ő∑ ŌÄőĮőĶŌÉő∑ ŌĄőŅŌÖ őīőĻőĪő≥ŌČőĹőĻŌÉőľőŅŌć őīőĶőĹ ŌĄőŅŌÖ ő≠ő≤ő≥őĪőĽőĶ ŌĄőŅőĹ őļőĪőĽŌĆ ŌĄőŅŌÖ ŌáőĪŌĀőĪőļŌĄőģŌĀőĪ, ő§őŅŌÖ ő≠ŌáŌČ ŌÄőĶőĻ ŌĄőĪ ŌÄŌĀőŅő≤őĽőģőľőĪŌĄő¨ őľőŅŌÖ. őü őĒőĻőŅőĹŌćŌÉő∑Ōā ŌÉőĶ őļő¨ŌÄőŅőĻőĶŌā ŌÜő¨ŌÉőĶőĻŌā őģŌĄőĪőĹ ŌáőĶőĻŌĀŌĆŌĄőĶŌĀőŅŌā ŌÄőĮŌÉŌČ őĪŌÄŌĆ ŌĄőĻŌā őļő¨őľőĶŌĀőĶŌā. őēőĮŌáőĶ őĹőĶŌćŌĀőĪ őĪŌÄŌĆ ŌĄőŅ ŌÄőŅŌÖőłőĶőĹő¨. őėőĪ őľőĻőĽőģŌÉŌČ őľőĪő∂őĮ ŌĄőŅŌÖ őľŌĆőĹőŅ őĪőĹ őľőĶ ŌÄő¨ŌĀőĶőĻ őľŌĆőĹőŅŌā ŌĄőŅŌÖ ŌĄő∑őĽő≠ŌÜŌČőĹőŅ őļőĪőĻ őłő≠őĽőĶőĻ őĹőĪ őľőŅŌÖ ŌÄőĶőĻ őļőĪŌĄőĻ¬Ľ.

Dengesini tamamen kaybeden ńįrem, nihayet iyileŇümek adńĪna b√ľy√ľk bir adńĪm atarken, yaptńĪńüńĪ misilleme ile Ilgaz‚ÄôlarńĪ karńĪŇütńĪrmayńĪ baŇüarńĪr. Dińüer yanda, Harun‚Äôun olay gecesindeki payńĪ t√ľm √ßńĪplaklńĪńüńĪyla ortaya √ßńĪkarken, yolu Ela‚ÄônńĪn yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ felaket gecesinden ge√ßen herkes i√ßin hesaplaŇüma vakti gelmiŇütir artńĪk. snippet.title: Eurovision Song Contest 2021 - Grand Final - Live Stream
snippet.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 will take place on 22 May. 26 Acts will perform in the final of which 6 countries are already pre-qualified. This are host country The Netherlands and the so called 'Big 5' consisting of France, Germany, Italy, Spain and the United Kingdom. Ten acts will qualify from the first-Semi-Final and the remaining ten acts will qualify from the Second Semi-Final. 

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

MAHALAGANG PAALALA:

Muli po naming pinapaalala na hanggang ngayon ay SARADO PA RIN PO ANG AMING ACTION CENTER sa TV5 Media Center, Reliance Street, Mandaluyong City.

Hindi pa rin po maaaring pumunta nang personal ang mga complainant para magreklamo kay Idol Raffy dahil sa ating kinahaharap na pandemya at mahigpit pa ring ipinapatupad ang mga safety measures upang maging ligtas ang lahat.

Gayunpaman, puwede ninyong i-PM ang inyong mga sumbong sa OFFICIAL Facebook page ni Idol na RAFFY TULFO IN ACTION na may mahigit 18 MILLION Followers. Nakahanda pong tumugon sa inyo ang RTIA researchers.

Maraming salamat sa inyong pag-unawa at mag-ingat po tayong lahat!

snippet.description:
M√ľge AnlńĪ'da aydńĪnlatńĪlan √ßifte cinayet. ńįki bin lira i√ßin ablasńĪnńĪ ve eniŇütesini √∂ld√ľrd√ľ. Uysal √ßifti davasńĪnda ne karar √ßńĪktńĪ? Uysal √ßifti cinayetinde adalet zamanńĪ. ńįki kardeŇü ve yeńüeni ile yengeleri yargńĪlanńĪyor... Uysal √ßifti cinayetinde tanńĪklar dinlendi. Tutuklu sanńĪk kardeŇüten tuhaf savunma... Birliktelik yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ evli sevgilisinin evinden kayboldu. Ailesi kńĪzlarńĪnńĪn √∂ld√ľr√ľld√ľńü√ľnden Ňü√ľpheleniyor. ńįki √ßocuk annesi 45 yaŇüńĪndaki Fatma √Ėz'den 36 g√ľnd√ľr haber yok. 19 Nisan'dan bu yana hi√ßbir ize rastlanmadńĪ. Sevgilisi canlńĪ yayńĪnda‚Ä¶ Bahri Bey, Fatma HanńĪm‚ÄôńĪn bir anda kaybolduńüunu, 3 bu√ßuk 4 gibi g√∂r√ľŇüt√ľklerini, sonra kendisinin iftara gittińüini, oradan d√∂n√ľŇüte eve geldińüinde evde olmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ s√∂yledi. Fatma √Ėz nerede? Fatma HanńĪm‚ÄôńĪn eŇüyalarńĪnńĪ √ßekyatńĪn altńĪna dizdińüini belirten Bahri Bey, √ßońüu kńĪyafetin gittińüini, eski kimlińüinin de masanńĪn √ľzerinde olduńüunu ifade etti. snippet.title: Audi RS e-tron GT v Porsche Taycan v Tesla Model S: DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click the following link and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson! http://bit.ly/-Help-Me-carwow
.............................................................

Check out RSymons RSEV - https://www.youtube.com/c/RSymonsLtd

Check out Yiannimize - https://www.youtube.com/c/Yiannimize

How‚Äôs this for an absolutely EPIC electric car showdown? We‚Äôve finally got our hands on the all-new Audi RS e-tron GT, and it‚Äôs going up against the Porsche Taycan Turbo and the Tesla Model S Performance!

So how do they compare on paper? Well first up we‚Äôve got Mat in the Audi - their most powerful road-going car to date, no less! Powered by two electric motors, it can put down 646hp and 830Nm, while it also weighs in at 2,340kg. Alongside him we have Yianni in the Taycan Turbo, which also comes with two electric motors but the ability to put down slightly more power, so it can produce 687hp and 850Nm of torque. In terms of weight, it‚Äôs almost identical to the Audi, weighing in at 2,380kg. 

And then finally we have the Tesla. It may cost a fair bit less than the Audi & Porsche (¬£70k vs ¬£112k & ¬£116k respectively), but it easily puts down the most power! With (you guessed it) two electric motors, it has the ability to produce 778hp and an epic 1,140Nm of torque! What‚Äôs more, it‚Äôs also the lightest car here, with a total weight of 2,316kg.

So, based on that, it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Tesla, right?! There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda | 37. B√∂l√ľm | "YARA ńįZńį"
snippet.description:
KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda'nńĪn 37. B√∂l√ľm√ľnde; Vahit (Uńüur Y√ľcel) yńĪllar sonra ilk kez i√ßinde yeni duygular uyandńĪran, hayatńĪnńĪ deńüiŇütiren kadńĪnńĪ, Ňěehrazat'ńĪ Doktor HanńĪm'a anlatńĪr.

YaŇüadńĪńüńĪ d√ľnyanńĪn yalan bir d√ľnya olduńüunu fark eden Nihal (Esra Ronabar) Doktor HanńĪm'a son g√ľnlerini ve Zafer'le olan konuŇümasńĪnńĪ anlatńĪr. ArtńĪk Nihal hayata yeniden baŇülamaya hazńĪrdńĪr.

Sadi (Erkan Petekkaya) en ańüńĪr ameliyatlarńĪndan birini, hapishane g√ľnlerini anlatarak Doktor HanńĪm'ńĪ ŇüaŇüńĪrttńĪ. 

KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda Youtube KanalńĪna Abone Olun : https://shorturl.at/hrvRW

KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda da baŇürol oyuncusu Binnur Kaya psikiyatri klinińüinin sahibi ve bir psikiyatristi canlandńĪracak. Psikiyatri klinińüinde doktorlarńĪnńĪ ve onlara baŇüvuran hastalarńĪn hayatlarńĪnńĪ anlatacańüńĪ "KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda"da her hayat hikayesinin altńĪnda yatan acńĪlar, sevin√ßler, mutluluk ve h√ľz√ľnler izleyicinin de ruhunun kapalńĪ kapńĪlarńĪnńĪ aralayacak. Hastalar o G√ľne kadar kimselere s√∂yleyemedikleri sńĪrlarńĪ dile getirirken izleyiciler de kendi bug√ľnleri, ge√ßmiŇüleri ve yarńĪnlarńĪna dair bir Ňüeyler bulacak.

Bir Zamanlar KńĪbrńĪs 6. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet:

SaldńĪrńĪlar ve zul√ľmlerden ka√ßan, k√∂ylerinden g√∂√ße zorlanan KńĪbrńĪs T√ľrk√ľ LefkoŇüa‚Äôya ulaŇümaya baŇülamńĪŇütńĪr. Ňěimdi erzak ve yatacak yer kńĪtlńĪńüńĪ en b√ľy√ľk sńĪkńĪntńĪdńĪr. Binlerce acńĪlńĪ insan LefkoŇüa sokaklarńĪnda a√ßlńĪkla, sońüukla ve barńĪnak sorunuyla m√ľcadele halindedir. Rauf DenktaŇü ve AnkaralńĪ, Makaryos‚Äôun gasp ettińüi yiyecek stońüunu ele ge√ßirmek i√ßin riskli bir plan kurar. Kemal ve DerviŇü ise Bereli‚Äôye suikast d√ľzenleyenin Samson olduńüunu √∂ńürenir. Samson, T√ľrk tarafńĪnda sńĪkńĪŇüńĪp kalmńĪŇütńĪr. Kemal, elindeki telsizle Samson ile bańülantńĪ kurar. Ňěimdi Kemal-Samson arasńĪnda Kemal‚Äôin y√∂nettińüi bir kedi-fare oyunu baŇülar. KGB, Ankara‚Äôda AyŇüe √ľzerinden Bereli‚Äônin kimlińüini deŇüifre edince Sovyetler ile ńįstihbarat arasńĪnda bir savaŇü baŇülar. Ankara sokaklarńĪnda silah sesleri konuŇüulur. ńįnci ise Samson‚Äôun yokluńüunu fńĪrsat bilip ka√ßar. Ňěimdi anne-kńĪzńĪ, Rum sokaklarńĪnda EOKA ile gergin bir takip ve ka√ßma kovalamaca beklemektedir.

Bir Zamanlar KńĪbrńĪs her PerŇüembe g√ľn√ľ yeni b√∂l√ľmleri ile saat 20.30'da TRT1'de.

snippet.title: KardeŇülerim 14. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
KardeŇülerim 14. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti: 
 ‚ÄúNe zaman bir d√ľŇü kursam, ertesi g√ľn hayal kńĪrńĪklńĪklarńĪnńĪ topluyorum‚ÄĚ
√Ėmer hastanede yatarken Suzan yanńĪndan ayrńĪlmaz. Orhan‚Äôla Ňěeng√ľl‚Äô√ľn yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ b√ľy√ľk tartńĪŇüma sonucu, Ňěeng√ľl evi terk eder. Melisa Kadir‚Äôin yarńĪm bńĪraktńĪńüńĪ okulu bitirmesi i√ßin destek olurken, Doruk Asiye‚Äônin yanńĪnda olmak i√ßin Selim‚Äôin kafesinde √ßalńĪŇümaya baŇülar. snippet.description:
Tozkoparan ńįskender 24. b√∂l√ľmde neler olacak?

ńįskender, Ece ve Ayberk‚Äôin planńĪ karŇüńĪsńĪnda s√ľper g√ľ√ßlerinin ortaya √ßńĪkmasńĪ tehlikesiyle karŇüńĪ karŇüńĪya kalńĪr. Salih ve Fikri ise taŇüńĪn izini s√ľrerken, √áL-B‚Äônin uyarńĪsńĪyla laboratuvara yabancńĪ birisinin girdińüini √∂ńürenir. Laboratuvara giren kiŇüi, zaman makinesini etkisiz hale getirmeye baŇülayńĪnca, Tozkoparanlar panik i√ßerisinde laboratuvara koŇüarak durumu kurtarmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪr. Dińüer yandan Tayfun ve Duygu, Ece ile Ayberk‚Äôin kendilerinden habersiz bir Ňüeyler √ßevirdińüini fark ederek onlarńĪ sorguya √ßeker. √úzerindeki baskńĪya dayanamayan Ayberk, soluńüu Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn yanńĪnda alńĪr ve Mavi Ay‚Äôa ńįskender‚Äôsiz bir ‚Äúhi√ß‚ÄĚ olduklarńĪnńĪ s√∂yler. Bu s√∂zlerden etkilenen Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn morali bozulunca, ńįskender devreye girer ve son karŇüńĪlaŇümaya katńĪlmayacańüńĪnńĪ a√ßńĪklar. ńįskender, Mavi Ay‚Äôa kendisi olmadan da KasńĪrga‚ÄôyńĪ yenebilecek g√ľ√ßte olduńüunu hatńĪrlatacaktńĪr. Ancak Giovanni, yine baŇüka bir hile peŇüindedir ve Mavi Ay‚ÄôńĪn karŇüńĪlaŇümada ‚Äúattan d√ľŇüm√ľŇüe d√∂nmesi‚ÄĚ i√ßin elinden geleni yapacaktńĪr. T√ľm bunlar olup biterken SavaŇü Hoca, Makbule teyzeye yaptńĪńüńĪ bir ziyaret esnasńĪnda zaman yolcuńüu i√ßin gereken taŇüńĪ bulur ve g√∂zlerine inanamaz. Gitme vaktinin yaklaŇütńĪńüńĪnńĪ g√∂ren ńįskender, sonunda R√ľya‚Äôya kendisinin Tozkoparan ńįskender olduńüunu itiraf eder.
Ayberk ve Ece, yaptńĪklarńĪ planla ńįskender‚Äôin s√ľper g√ľ√ßlerini ortaya √ßńĪkarabilecek mi? Salih ve Fikri, laboratuvara girip zaman makinesini bozan kiŇüiyi yakalayabilecek mi? Son karŇüńĪlaŇümanńĪn galibi kim olacak? Mavi Ay, son karŇüńĪlaŇümaya ger√ßekten de ńįskender‚Äôsiz mi katńĪlacak? R√ľya, ńįskender‚Äôin itirafńĪ karŇüńĪsńĪnda ne yapacak?

HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, verdińüi savaŇüta tek tek sevdiklerini kaybeder. HńĪzńĪr Ali‚Äônin Didem‚Äôle evlendińüi g√ľn saldńĪrńĪya uńüramasńĪyla Ňüok yaŇüayan √áakńĪrbeyli ailesi, Didem‚Äôin acńĪ haberi ile yńĪkńĪlńĪr. KńĪzńĪnńĪn √∂l√ľm haberiyle kendini kaybeden HaŇümet Fa√ßalńĪ ise saldńĪrńĪnńĪn arkasńĪndaki isim olan RńĪdvan‚ÄôńĪn mekanńĪ basar. RńĪdvan‚ÄôńĪn adamlarńĪnńĪ tek tek indiren HaŇümet Fa√ßalńĪ, yedińüi kurŇüunlarla yere yńĪńüńĪlńĪr. 

Gelinin √∂ld√ľńü√ľ g√ľn dostu HaŇümet Fa√ßalńĪ‚ÄôyńĪ da kaybetmek istemeyen HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, elinden geleni yapar. YaŇüanan onca karmaŇüanńĪn arasńĪnda ońülundan gelen sevindirici haberle bir nebzede olsa i√ßi rahatlayan HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, d√ľŇümanńĪnńĪ yok etmek i√ßin kollarńĪ sńĪvar. Topyek√ľn savaŇüa hazńĪr olan √áakńĪrbeyli ailesi ve dostlarńĪ, bu uńüurda her Ňüeyi yapmaya hazńĪrdńĪr. HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, hala hedef olan ońülu HńĪzńĪr Ali‚Äôyi koruma g√∂revini ise yeńüeni Alpaslan √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äôye verir. 

Tek tek aile √ľyelerini kaybeden RńĪdvan, bu kez de bombalńĪ saldńĪrńĪ yapmak i√ßin kollarńĪ sńĪvar.

snippet.title: G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ 30. B√∂l√ľm 2. Fragman (Sezon Finali)
snippet.description:
G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ dizisi ve √ßok daha fazlasńĪ TRT ńįzle'de ‚Üí https://www.trtizle.com/diziler/gonul-dagi/
----------------------
BozkńĪrda bir Anadolu masalńĪ #G√∂n√ľlDańüńĪ yeni b√∂l√ľmleriyle her cumartesi 20.00'de #TRT1‚Äôde!

BozkńĪrda bir Anadolu masalńĪ... SapsarńĪ topraklarńĪn, yńĪllarca dile gelen efsanelerin, unutulmaz aŇüklarńĪn hikayesidir G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ...
K√ľ√ß√ľk d√ľnyalarńĪnda b√ľy√ľk hayaller yeŇüerten Anadolu √ßocuklarńĪnńĪn hikayesidir G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ‚Ä¶
BozkńĪrda hayallerinin peŇüinden koŇüan ve t√ľm engellere rańümen imkansńĪzńĪ baŇüarmaya √ßalńĪŇüan 3 kuzenin hikayesidir G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ‚Ä¶
YazdńĪńüńĪ t√ľm hikayelerde bozkńĪrńĪ ve bu cońürafyada yaŇüayan insanlarńĪ samimi bir dille eserlerine yansńĪtan ‚ÄúBozkńĪrńĪn kalemi‚ÄĚ¬†Mustafa √áift√ßi‚Äônin g√ľn y√ľz√ľne √ßńĪkmamńĪŇü √∂yk√ľlerinden esinlenilerek senaryolaŇütńĪrńĪlan G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ, ilk b√∂l√ľmde izleyicilerin beńüenisini kazanacak ekranlara kilitleyecek bir dizi...
ńįzleyenlerin memleket √∂zlemini giderecek g√∂rsel bir Ňü√∂len...
Berk Atan¬†ve¬†G√ľls√ľm Ali ńįlhan‚ÄôńĪn baŇürollerini √ľstlendińüi dizi, bozkńĪrńĪn ortasńĪnda yer alan Ňüirin bir kasabada yaŇüayan sńĪcakkanlńĪ, sevecen Anadolu insanńĪnńĪn √∂yk√ľs√ľn√ľ anlatńĪyor. Efsaneleri, gelenekleri, Ňüehirlerde unutulmaya y√ľz tutmuŇü deńüerleri g√∂n√ľlden yaŇüayan, alńĪn teriyle kazanńĪrken sevdasńĪnńĪ y√ľreńüiyle hisseden, umutlarńĪ ve hayalleri uńüruna yaŇüam m√ľcadelesi veren insanlarńĪn hikayesi...
√áocukluk aŇükńĪ Dilek‚Äôle bir g√ľn buluŇüma hayali kuran Taner‚Äôin kuzenleriyle yaptńĪńüńĪ m√ľthiŇü icat‚Ä¶ D√ľńü√ľnc√ľleri, ańüńĪt√ßńĪlarńĪ, gelenekleri, t√ľm samimiyetiyle Anadolu insanńĪ... BozkńĪr topraklarńĪnńĪn s√ľs√ľ √∂zg√ľrl√ľk timsali YńĪlki AtlarńĪ...
Nerde bir aŇüńĪńüńĪn, bir yetimin kalbi kńĪrńĪlsa G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪndan bir par√ßa taŇü kopar derler ama b√ľy√ľk ama k√ľ√ß√ľk...
Sevdiklerine kavuŇüamayan aŇüńĪklara, savurduńüu taŇülarla kol kanat geren G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ..
ńįzlerken yaŇüayacak, hissedecek, duygulanacak ve g√∂n√ľlden bańülanacaksńĪnńĪz...

YazdńĪńüńĪ t√ľm hikayelerde bozkńĪrńĪ ve bu cońürafyada yaŇüayan insanlarńĪ samimi bir dille eserlerine yansńĪtan Mustafa √áift√ßi‚Äônin √∂yk√ľlerinden esinlenilerek senaryolaŇütńĪrńĪlan G√∂n√ľl DańüńĪ‚ÄônńĪn yapńĪmcńĪlńĪńüńĪnńĪ Ferhat EŇüsiz, y√∂netmenlińüini Yahya SamancńĪ yapńĪyor. BaŇürollerini Berk Atan ve G√ľlsim Ali ńįlhan'ńĪn √ľstlendińüi dizide, sanat d√ľnyasńĪnńĪn usta isimleri Ecem √Ėzkaya, Ferdi Sancar, Ali D√ľŇüenkalkar, Erdal Cindoruk, G√ľlhan Tekin, Feyza IŇüńĪk, Ege Aydan, Eser Ey√ľbońülu, Cihat S√ľvariońülu, Semih Ert√ľrk, NazlńĪ PńĪnar Kaya, Ňěebnem Dilligil, Yavuz Sepet√ßi, Nuri G√∂kaŇüan, H√ľseyin Sevimli ve √áińüdem Ayg√ľn rol alńĪyor.
-------------------------------------------

snippet.description:

6 MayńĪs PerŇüembe

OlaylarńĪn ortaya √ßńĪkmasńĪndan sonra babasńĪ Rafet'in gazabńĪndan kurtulamayan Sedat can havliyle iŇüleri d√ľzeltmeye √ßalńĪŇüńĪr.

Sinirli bir Ňüekilde araba kullanńĪrken gerektińüinden fazla hńĪz yaptńĪńüńĪndan kaza ge√ßirir. Sedat'ńĪn kaza haberini alan t√ľm ailesi ise yastadńĪr. Vicdan azabńĪ √ßeken Cana da hastaneye gelir. Herkes Sedat'tan gelecek g√ľzel haberi beklemektedir. Nalan da dahil olmak √ľzere. Ancak gelen bir haber t√ľm yaŇüanacaklarńĪ temelinden sarsacaktńĪr. Sedat'a ne olacak?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. snippet.title: Israeli Iron Dome filmed intercepting rockets from Gaza
snippet.description:
Sirens blared in the coastal Israeli city of Ashkelon as the Iron Dome missile defence system intercepted rockets in the sky.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Despite having a high rate of success the system doesn't stop every attack and rockets fired from Gaza killed two women in Asheklon.

snippet.title: Israel destroys Gaza tower housing foreign media - BBC News
snippet.description:
A tower block in Gaza, housing media organisations, including The Associated Press and Al-Jazeera, plus a number of offices and apartments, has collapsed after being hit by an Israeli strike.

The building had been evacuated beforehand after the owner received a warning by Israel in advance of the attack, Reuters news agency says.

In a statement released shortly afterwards, the Israeli military said the building housed military assets belonging to Hamas, the Palestinian militant group that rules Gaza.

Earlier, at least 10 people were killed, including children, in a strike on a refugee camp in Gaza, according to officials.

Hamas has fired dozens of rockets at cities in Israel, killing one man near Tel Aviv.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#Israel #Gaza #BBCNews

snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.title: Watch the moment an Israeli air strike hits the Associated Press and Al-Jazeera offices in Gaza
snippet.description:
Israeli air strikes destroyed a¬†Gaza high-rise housing international media offices on Saturday, in an attack The Associated Press described as¬†the latest step by the military to silence reporting from the territory.

Who‚Äôs up for a Golf R drag race! 

We‚Äôve brought in the all-new Mk8 Golf R to go up against its older brother, the Mk7, to see which is the fastest over the quarter-mile. 

As you‚Äôd suspect, there‚Äôs very little to split them when you look at the stats on paper. Starting with the Mk8, it‚Äôs powered by a 2-litre turbocharged 4 cylinder petrol engine, which delivers 320hp & 420Nm. It weighs in at 1,551kg, and costs from around ¬£39,000. 

As for the Mk7, well it‚Äôs also powered by a 2-litre turbocharged 4 cylinder petrol engine, although it only puts down 300hp and 400Nm. It does weigh slightly less though, coming in at 1,483kg. This is largely down to the newer Golf R having a more advanced AWD system, however.

So what do you think - will the Mk8 walk it? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: Eurovision 2021 ‚Äď Cyprus - őąőĽőĶőĹőĪ ő§ŌÉőĪő≥őļŌĀőĻőĹőŅŌć: ¬ęő†őĻŌÉŌĄőĶŌćŌČ ŌĆŌĄőĻ őľőĪŌā ő¨őĺőĻő∂őĶ őļő¨ŌĄőĻ őļőĪőĽŌćŌĄőĶŌĀőŅ¬Ľ
snippet.description:
őó őąőĽőĶőĹőĪ ő§ŌÉőĪő≥őļŌĀőĻőĹőŅŌć őĶőļŌÄŌĀőŅŌÉŌéŌÄő∑ŌÉőĶ ŌĄő∑őĹ őöŌćŌÄŌĀőŅ ŌÉŌĄő∑ Eurovision 2021 őĶŌĀőľő∑őĹőĶŌćőŅőĹŌĄőĪŌā ŌĄőŅ ¬ęEl Diablo¬Ľ őļőĪőĻ őļőĪŌĄő≠őļŌĄő∑ŌÉőĶ ŌĄő∑ 16ő∑ őłő≠ŌÉő∑. 
őó őĪő≥őĪŌÄő∑őľő≠őĹő∑ ŌĄŌĀőĪő≥őŅŌÖőīőĮŌÉŌĄŌĀőĻőĪ őľőĮőĽő∑ŌÉőĶ ŌÉŌĄő∑őĹ őļő¨őľőĶŌĀőĪ ŌĄő∑Ōā őĶőļŌÄőŅőľŌÄőģŌā ¬ęő£ŌĄő∑ ŌÜŌČőĽőĻő¨ ŌĄŌČőĹ őöőŅŌÖ őöőŅŌÖ¬Ľ őļőĪőĻ ŌĄőŅőĹ őôŌÉőĮőīŌČŌĀőŅ ő¶őĮőļőĪŌĀő∑ őĽő≠ő≥őŅőĹŌĄőĪŌā őĪŌĀŌáőĻőļő¨: ¬ęőēŌÖŌáőĪŌĀőĻŌÉŌĄŌé ŌÄő¨ŌĀőĪ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć ő≥őĻőĪ ŌĄő∑őĹ ŌÖŌÄőŅŌÉŌĄőģŌĀőĻőĺő∑, őģŌĄőĪőĹ ŌĆőĽőĪ ŌÖŌÄő≠ŌĀőŅŌáőĪ. őēő≥Ōé őļŌĀőĪŌĄő¨ŌČ ŌÄő¨őĹŌĄőĪ ŌĄőĪ őļőĪőĽő¨. őČŌĄőĪőĹ őľőĻőĪ ŌÖŌÄő≠ŌĀőŅŌáő∑ őĶőľŌÄőĶőĻŌĀőĮőĪ őļőĪőĻ őĶŌÖŌáőĪŌĀőĻŌÉŌĄŌé ŌÄő¨ŌĀőĪ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć ŌĄőŅőĹ őļŌĆŌÉőľőŅ.¬Ľ


őēőĹŌé ő≥őĻőĪ ŌĄő∑ 16ő∑ őłő≠ŌÉő∑ ŌÄőŅŌÖ őļőĪŌĄő≠őļŌĄő∑ŌÉőĶ ő∑ őöŌćŌÄŌĀőŅŌā ŌÉŌĄő∑ ŌÜőĶŌĄőĻőĹőģ Eurovision őīőģőĽŌČŌÉőĶ: ¬ęő£ŌĄőĶőĹőĪŌáŌČŌĀőģőłő∑őļőĪ ŌÉŌĄő∑őĹ őĪŌĀŌáőģ. ő†őĻŌÉŌĄőĶŌćŌČ ŌĆŌĄőĻ őľőĪŌā ő¨őĺőĻő∂őĶ őļő¨ŌĄőĻ őļőĪőĽŌćŌĄőĶŌĀőŅ, őĪőĽőĽő¨ őļőĪŌĄő¨őĽőĪő≤őĪ ŌĆŌĄőĻ őĶőĮőĹőĪőĻ ő≠őĹőĪŌā őīőĻőĪő≥ŌČőĹőĻŌÉőľŌĆŌā őļőĪőĻ őľŌÄőŅŌĀőĶőĮ őĹőĪ ŌÉŌÖőľő≤őĶőĮ őļő¨ŌĄőĻ ŌĄő≠ŌĄőŅőĻőŅ. ő£ŌÖő≥őļőĻőĹőģőłő∑őļőĪ ŌÄő¨ŌĀőĪ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć. őúőĶ ŌĄő∑őĹ ő§ŌÉő≠őĻőĽőĻ (ő∑ ŌáőŅŌĀőŅő≥ŌĀő¨ŌÜőŅŌā ŌĄőŅŌÖ El Diablo) őļőĽőĪőĮő≥őĪőľőĶ őĪŌÄŌĆ őĶőĹőłőŅŌÖŌÉőĻőĪŌÉőľŌĆ őļőĪőĻ ŌáőĪŌĀő¨. őČŌĄőĪőĹ őľőĻőĪ ŌÄő¨ŌĀőĪ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć ŌČŌĀőĪőĮőĪ őĶőľŌÄőĶőĻŌĀőĮőĪ, őĪőĽőĽő¨ ŌÄőĻŌÉŌĄőĶŌćŌČ ŌĆŌĄőĻ őĶőĮőĹőĪőĻ ő≥őĻőĪ őľőĻőĪ ŌÜőŅŌĀő¨ ŌÉŌĄő∑ ő∂ŌČőģ. őĎŌÄŌĆ ŌĆŌĄőĻ ő≠őīőĶőĻőĺőĶ őļőĪőĻ ő∑ őĪő≥ő¨ŌÄő∑ ŌĄőŅŌÖ őļŌĆŌÉőľőŅŌÖ, ő∑ őĶőľŌÜő¨őĹőĻŌÉőģ őľőĪŌā őģŌĄőĪőĹ ŌÄőŅőĽŌć őīŌÖőĹőĪŌĄőģ őļőĪőĻ őĶőĮőľőĪŌÉŌĄőĶ őĶŌÖŌáőĪŌĀőĻŌÉŌĄő∑őľő≠őĹőŅőĻ. őĒőĶőĹ őĺő≠ŌĀŌČ ŌĄőĻ ő≠ŌÜŌĄőĪőĻőĺőĶ. őĎőĹ őľŌÄőŅŌĀőĶőĮŌĄőĶ őĹőĪ őľőŅŌÖ ŌÄőĶőĮŌĄőĶ őĶŌÉőĶőĮŌā.¬Ľ

őĒőĶőĮŌĄőĶ ŌĄőŅ őĪŌÄŌĆŌÉŌÄőĪŌÉőľőĪ őĪŌÄŌĆ ŌĄő∑őĹ őĶőļŌÄőŅőľŌÄőģ ¬ęő£ŌĄő∑ ő¶ŌČőĽőĻő¨ ŌĄŌČőĹ őöőŅŌÖ őöőŅŌÖ¬Ľ

snippet.description:

Dińüer yandan Giovanni, izini bulduńüu taŇüńĪ geri almak i√ßin 1 milyon liraya ihtiyacńĪ olduńüunu anlayńĪnca, parayńĪ vermeden taŇüńĪ ele ge√ßirebilmenin yollarńĪnńĪ arar. Tozkoparanlar da Vecihi sayesinde taŇüńĪn peŇüindedir. Vecihi taŇütan sinyal alńĪnca Salih, Fikri ve SavaŇü bir kez daha taŇüńĪn peŇüine d√ľŇüerler. T√ľm bunlar olurken Ayberk, ńįskender‚Äôin hedefi deviren son atńĪŇüńĪndan sonra KasńĪrga takńĪmńĪnńĪ bir kez daha ńįskender‚Äôin s√ľper g√ľ√ßleri olduńüuna ikna etmeye √ßalńĪŇüńĪr ve bu sefer baŇüarńĪlńĪ olur. Tayfun‚Äôun liderlińüinde KasńĪrga, ńįskender‚Äôin s√ľper g√ľ√ßleri olduńüunu ortaya √ßńĪkarmak i√ßin bir plan yapar. Mavi Ay ise KasńĪrga‚ÄônńĪn niyetini anlamńĪŇütńĪr ve ńįskender‚Äôin sńĪrrńĪnńĪn ortaya √ßńĪkmamasńĪ i√ßin elinden geleni yapmaya hazńĪrdńĪr. Ancak ńįskender‚Äôin aklńĪ, ge√ßmiŇüte yerini baŇükasńĪnńĪn almńĪŇü olabileceńüi fikrine takńĪlńĪp kalmńĪŇütńĪr. Bunun √ľzerine Tozkoparanlar, bir kez daha ormana giderek ńįskender‚Äôin niŇüan taŇüńĪna bakmaya karar verirler. NiŇüan taŇüńĪna gittiklerinde g√∂rd√ľkleri Ňüey, bu kez sadece ńįskender‚Äôin adńĪnńĪn silinmesi deńüildir.
ńįskender devirdińüi hedef tahtasńĪ i√ßin nasńĪl bir a√ßńĪklama yapacak? KasńĪrga‚ÄônńĪn hilesi ortaya √ßńĪkacak mńĪ? Mavi Ay, ńįskender‚Äôin s√ľper g√ľ√ßlerinin KasńĪrga tarafńĪndan ortaya √ßńĪkarńĪlmasńĪna engel olabilecek mi? Zaman makinesi i√ßin gerekli olan taŇüńĪ Giovanni mi yoksa Tozkoparanlar mńĪ ele ge√ßirecek? ńįskender‚Äôin niŇüan taŇüńĪnda deńüiŇüen Ňüey ne?

snippet.title: Fresh barrage of Gaza rocket fire hits Israeli cities overnight
snippet.description:
A fresh barrage of rockets hit the Israeli cities of Ashkelon and Sderot on Wednesday, causing damage to houses and vehicles.

Local residents rushed to bomb shelters while rockets were seen being intercepted in the sky by Israel's Iron Dome anti-missile system over Ashkelon.

Israel and Gaza militants vowed to keep fighting after US President Joe Biden urged Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to seek a "de-escalation" on the path to a ceasefire in the conflict.

An Egyptian security source said the two sides had agreed in principle to a ceasefire after help from mediators, although details were still being negotiated in secret amid public denials of a deal to prevent it from collapsing.

Palestinian health officials said that since fighting began on May 10, 228 people had been killed in aerial bombardments that have worsened an already dire humanitarian situation in Gaza.

Israeli authorities put the death toll at 12 in Israel, where repeated rocket attacks have caused panic and sent people rushing into shelters.

In Gaza, the sounds of explosions roared at nightfall with heavy bombardments reported in the enclave's centre and south.

Hamas began firing rockets on May 10 in retaliation for what it said were Israeli rights abuses against Palestinians in Jerusalem during the Muslim holy month of Ramadan.

The rocket attacks followed Israeli security police clashes with worshippers at al-Aqsa Mosque in Jerusalem and a court case by Israeli settlers to evict Palestinians from a neighbourhood in Israeli-annexed East Jerusalem.

Read more
Netanyahu defies Biden & Putin‚Äôs call for de-escalation & ‚Äėwon‚Äôt surrender to Hamas‚Äô as Gaza death toll rises to 227

KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda'nńĪn 39. B√∂l√ľm√ľnde; Mitra (Melisa AslńĪ Pamuk) Doktor HanńĪm'a bug√ľne kadar herkesten sakladńĪńüńĪ sńĪrrńĪnńĪ, Paris g√ľnlerinin onun i√ßin ne ifade ettińüini anlattńĪ.

Vahit Bey (Uńüur Y√ľcel) ge√ßmiŇüte yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ canńĪna kńĪyma teŇüebb√ľs√ľn√ľ Doktor HanńĪm'a itiraf ederken bir yandan da Vahit Bey'in eŇüi Nurcihan HanńĪm (ItńĪr Esen) ilk kez KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda'ya gelip Vahit'e olan ger√ßek duygularńĪnńĪ itiraf etti.

Sadi (Erkan Petekkaya) biricik eŇüi Azra'yla yńĪllar sonra kavuŇümalarńĪnńĪ anlatńĪrken, bir yandan da kapanmayan yarasńĪ Mi√ßo'dan bahsederek Doktor HanńĪm'ńĪ etkiledi. 

KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda Youtube KanalńĪna Abone Olun : https://shorturl.at/hrvRW

KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda da baŇürol oyuncusu Binnur Kaya psikiyatri klinińüinin sahibi ve bir psikiyatristi canlandńĪracak. Psikiyatri klinińüinde doktorlarńĪnńĪ ve onlara baŇüvuran hastalarńĪn hayatlarńĪnńĪ anlatacańüńĪ "KńĪrmńĪzńĪ Oda"da her hayat hikayesinin altńĪnda yatan acńĪlar, sevin√ßler, mutluluk ve h√ľz√ľnler izleyicinin de ruhunun kapalńĪ kapńĪlarńĪnńĪ aralayacak. Hastalar o G√ľne kadar kimselere s√∂yleyemedikleri sńĪrlarńĪ dile getirirken izleyiciler de kendi bug√ľnleri, ge√ßmiŇüleri ve yarńĪnlarńĪna dair bir Ňüeyler bulacak.

snippet.title: Son Yaz 19. B√∂l√ľm | BaŇü TacńĪm
snippet.description:
Son Yaz 19. B√∂l√ľm Tek Par√ßa (22 MayńĪs 2021)

Dońüum g√ľn√ľ sonrasńĪnda kendisini Kara ailesinin bir par√ßasńĪ gibi hissetmeye baŇülayan Akg√ľn, kabul edildińüi ailenin kńĪzńĪ ile gizli gizli iliŇüki yaŇüamaktadńĪr. Akg√ľn G√∂kalp TaŇükńĪn bu durumu i√ßine sindiremese de Selim'in y√ľz√ľne s√∂ylemesine bu defa Yańümur izin vermez. ńįliŇükilerini kimseden izin almadan yaŇüayacaklardńĪr. Her Ňüeyin farkńĪnda olan Canan‚ÄôńĪn Akg√ľn'e tepkisi ise √ßok farklńĪ olacaktńĪr. Selim de artńĪk Canan'la yaŇüadńĪklarńĪ yeniden yakńĪnlaŇümaya bir isim koymak istemektedir. Canan'a hazńĪrlayacańüńĪ s√ľrpriz hi√ß beklemedińüi Ňüekilde noktalanńĪr. Soner ve Eray'ńĪn arasńĪ, Eray'ńĪn Naz'la ilgili yapacańüńĪ bir hamle ile iyice a√ßńĪlńĪr. Soner'i yatńĪŇütńĪrmak hi√ß kolay olmayacaktńĪr. Akg√ľn bir yandan G√∂khan'a verdińüi s√∂z√ľ tutmak i√ßin yarńĪŇüa hazńĪrlanńĪrken bir yandan da taze sevgilisine bir ilk buluŇüma s√ľrprizi hazńĪrlamaya karar verir. Fakat G√∂khan'ńĪn Akg√ľn i√ßin baŇüka planlarńĪ vardńĪr. Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn'ńĪ takńĪntńĪ haline getirmiŇü olan G√∂khan gerekirse Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn'ńĪ √∂z ońülunun acńĪsńĪyla sńĪnamaya hazńĪrdńĪr. 

ńįdealist Cumhuriyet SavcńĪsńĪ Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yńĪl √∂nce hapse yolladńĪńüńĪ organize su√ß lideri Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn‚Äôdan (Arif PiŇükin) reddedemeyeceńüi bir teklif alńĪr. Sel√ßuk TaŇükńĪn, SavcńĪ Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn b√ľt√ľn su√ß √∂rg√ľt√ľn√ľ √ß√∂kertecek davasńĪnda, tanńĪklńĪk yapmayńĪ istemektedir. Ancak bunun i√ßin tek bir ŇüartńĪ vardńĪr; ońülu Akg√ľn G√∂kalp TaŇükńĪn‚ÄôńĪ (Alperen Duymaz) Selim Kara‚ÄônńĪn bizzat korumasńĪ‚Ä¶ Su√ß d√ľnyasńĪ i√ßinde b√ľy√ľm√ľŇü, tehlikeli ve sorunlu g√∂r√ľn√ľm√ľn√ľn ardńĪnda duygusal bir gen√ß olan Akg√ľn i√ßin bu kabul edilmesi g√ľ√ß bir durumdur. Hayat beklemedińüi bir yerden daha sńĪnar Selim‚Äôi; ńįzmir‚Äôde √ßocuklarńĪ ile yaŇüayan eŇüi Canan (Funda Eryińüit) boŇüanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile iŇüi arasńĪnda kalan SavcńĪ Kara, baŇü belasńĪ olarak g√∂rd√ľńü√ľ Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľ ailesinin yanńĪna ńįzmir √áeŇüme‚Äôde bulunan Adalet Sitesi‚Äône g√∂t√ľrmek zorunda kalńĪr. Selim‚Äôin beklenmeyen misafiri Akg√ľn‚Äô√ľn geliŇüi site sakinlerinin t√ľm dengelerini alt√ľst edecek; Ege‚Äôde baŇülayan bu r√ľzg√Ęr, herkesin hayatńĪnńĪ deńüiŇütirecek b√ľy√ľk bir fńĪrtńĪnaya d√∂n√ľŇüecektir.

Son Yaz Cuma 20.00'de FOX'ta!

OYUNCULAR: ALPEREN DUYMAZ, ALńį ATAY, FUNDA ERYńįńěńįT, HAFSANUR SANCAKTUTAN, EMRE KARAYEL, SńįNAN TUZCU, ŇěEBNEM D√ĖNMEZ, ARńįF PńįŇěKńįN, SEZER KO√á, HALńįL BAB√úR, YASEMńįN YAZICI, ERDEM ŇěANLI, YUNUS NARńįN, ATA NEDńįM ARMAN, SARP ńįKńįLER, CENGńįZ OKUYUCU

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family‚Äôs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad‚Äôs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi‚Äôs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love.
